mano_cua.result_summary: 所有页面返回500 Internal Server Error，无法渲染任何内容。服务器日志显示'TypeError: localStorage.getItem is not a function'（SSR环境无localStorage），导致Next.js SSR完全崩溃。尝试了/(根路径)、/docs/components/buttons等多个路径均500。按钮组件(Icon Button/Theme Toggler)无法访问和测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All 81 steps spent trying to access the page but all routes return 500 Internal Server Error. Server log shows localStorage.getItem TypeError during SSR. The application cannot render any page.
